summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Firmes church management system. All key features tested successfully including branding, authentication, navigation, discipleship module, and member management.
passed_tests: Landing page correctly shows 'Firmes' branding (not 'Firmes na Fé')
Super Admin login works with admin@firmes.com / admin123
Church Admin login works with pastor@vidanova.com / pastor123
Discipleship page shows 5 default trails (found 9 trail cards)
Member profile page has all 5 required tabs: Dados, Ministérios, Financeiro, Discipulado, Espiritual
Members page has view profile button (eye icon)
UI components render properly with good design
